title: Horror Camp
description: This realistic hardcore horror modpack combines alot of horror aspects/shaders/gameplay elements to spice up your minecraft world! :)
body:
**Horror Camp. v. 3.4.1 (STABLE RELEASE)**

**This realistic hardcore horror modpack combines alot of horror aspects/shaders/gameplay elements to spice up your minecraft world! Start in an abandoned lighthouse!**

_**Modpack Mods (HIGHLIGHTS)**_

- Play with friends with Essential
- Temparature simulation: Is it cold? Hot? Make clothing for the type of season ur in!
- Seasonal crops: Certain crops only grow in certain seasons how it would in real life.
- Hydration: Yes u have to drink water now (also for regeneration)
- Horror Mob Monsters: Cave Dweller, The Man from the fog, and more! (Also custom horror biome!)
- Guns ranging from assault rifles, sniper rifles, shotguns and more! (ammo included :)
- Custom Starter map
- Revamped rexperienced dungeons and structures
- Revamped World generation. New biomes ect
- Voice chat (Simple voice chat)
- Multiple shader choices
- Custom turned on shader

_**Additional Notes:**_

- T keybind is the tacz menu. Reset it inside the keybind options to chat or use /
- For Modern cpu's Ryzen 5 2000 or higher, i5 6th gen or higher. Enable 6 or 9 Render ahead limit inside the performance options in the video settings, for extra performance. (NOT REQUIERD)
- MultiMC Compatible
- Download link for the custom world: [Custom World](https://drive.google.com/file/d/19-Jma-2OpnUuUxzYiR4BhlqQDdbA_MYE/view?usp=sharing) Unpack with Winrar/7zip

We have serverely tested this modpack by playing it for a couple hours with our friends. I must say.. the experiences we made where hilarious!

Also if u played with this modpack, maybe leave some feedback? Follow the project for updates!

Thanks in advance. :)

Lantern Games.
